subtitle: Capabilities for building and operating modern data platforms.

categories.title: Cloud Warehouses
categories.text: Snowflake Snowpipe, Streams, Tasks, Time Travel, Zero‑Copy Cloning, RBAC, external tables, dynamic tables, secure views, data sharing, AWS S3 & Lambda, and Azure for cloud‑native data platforms.

categories.title: Data Engineering
categories.text: IICS mappings & taskflows, DBT models and data marts, PySpark on Databricks, and Airflow‑orchestrated SQL/Python pipelines for end‑to‑end ETL/ELT and automation.

categories.title: Modeling & Data Quality
categories.text: Star and snowflake schemas, medallion and lakehouse patterns, governance and access practices, monitoring of pipelines, and checks that keep data accurate and reliable for analytics.

categories.title: Programming & BI
categories.text: SQL / PL‑SQL, Python automation and validation scripts, Streamlit dashboards, and BI tools like Tableau and Power BI for reporting and platform observability.

toolsSubtitle: Core platforms and frameworks I use.
